comment: Timestamp stripping now only removes leading ISO-like timestamps, so error markers are preserved for grep.
Worktree setup now uses a serialized lock around creation to avoid concurrent git worktree races.
Failed CI checks now stay in the result even when details_url does not contain a GitHub Actions run id.
CI checks are fetched once per PR and reused by gate and fix phases.
Conflict-marker detection now scans all tracked files instead of a hardcoded extension list.
